metadata.description: A growing collection of Claude Code skills by animesh-builds.

plugins.name: animesh-product-builder-skills
plugins.description: Product architect and planning partner: scopes, designs, and documents a software project into a local planning doc kit (PRD, architecture, design language, content, ADR/decision log, session history, and a Claude Code handoff) so it can be handed off and built with no major judgment calls left open.
